name: blender-mcp
title: Blender
description: Blender 3D modelling via TCP socket addon — object CRUD, materials, scene inspection, code execution, screenshot capture
author: ahujasid

env.name: BLENDER_PORT
env.description: TCP port for Blender addon socket server

setup.help_text: Install the Blender MCP addon: download from the repository, then in Blender → Edit → Preferences → Add-ons → Install. Enable the addon and start the socket server. The MCP connects via TCP on the configured port.
prerequisites: Blender MCP addon installed and enabled
Addon socket server running in Blender

certification.security_notes: Executes arbitrary Python code inside Blender via execute_blender_code tool — expected for addon pattern. No network exfil beyond optional Poly Haven / Sketchfab integrations.

notes: Dominant Blender MCP (18k+ stars). Requires Blender addon installed separately. Two-component: addon runs TCP socket server inside Blender, MCP server bridges to it. Supports Poly Haven, Hyper3D Rodin, Sketchfab integrations.
